posts.author: mondayuser99 (Monday User)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently, when creating charts, the Y-axis options are limited to specific column types and do not include the option to select a mirror column.

What are you trying to achieve

The ability to visualize cross-board data directly in charts. This would enhance dashboards on Monday overall.
